meaning: n.瑙ｉ噴,闃愭槑,鍙ｈ瘧,閫氳瘧
examples: History is always a matter of interpretation.
She stamped her own interpretation on the role.
Her interpretation of the facts may be open to doubt.
Recruits will then be able to run solar and celestial interpretation workshops on the site.
It was, by that interpretation, a new version of the old campaign, "It's Scotland's Oil".
